app.name: warg
app.one_liner: A declarative CLI framework for Go that enforces subcommand-only usage, unifies flag sources, and provides rich, colored help output.

screens.name: CLI Help Display
screens.purpose: Show structured, colored help output including current flag values and command hierarchy.

rust_commands.name: parse_command
rust_commands.purpose: Parse and validate CLI input against declared command structure and flag definitions.

rust_commands.name: render_help
rust_commands.purpose: Generate rich, colored help output showing current flag values and command descriptions.

mvp_plan: week 1: Add basic help rendering with color support
week 1: Build unified flag resolution from args/env/config/defaults
week 1: Implement core command declaration API
acceptance_tests: Given a declared subcommand with a required flag, when the user omits the flag, then the system shows an error and compact help.
Given a flag set via environment variable and overridden via CLI arg, then the CLI value takes precedence and is shown in help output.
